title: gymnocoronis spilanthoides var. attenuata
intro: Gymnocoronis spilanthoides var. attenuata, also known as the water thyme or narrow-leaved water thyme, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including reducing fever, treating digestive problems, and offering protection against certain bacterial infections. The herbal preparations of Gymnocoronis spilanthoides var. attenuata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas or applied topically to skin conditions.
